panels.description: Per-operation call rate to the LightRAG backend (insert/query/entity/relation CRUD/health), per selected memory stack. The core graphify read/write path. Sudden drops mean ingestion or query stall. Confirmed live: lightrag_calls_total{job="tatara-memory",service} scraped from mem-tatara and mem-infrastructure.
panels.title: LightRAG call rate by op

panels.description: Fraction of LightRAG calls returning result=error over 5m, per selected memory stack. Backs the 'Memory LightRAG call error ratio high' alert (fires >10% for 10m).
panels.title: LightRAG error ratio

panels.description: LightRAG call latency quantiles over 5m, per selected memory stack. Backs the 'LightRAG call p95 latency high' alert (fires p95 >30s for 15m).
panels.title: LightRAG call latency (p95/p99)

panels.description: Repo-ingest job completion rate by terminal status, per selected memory stack. status=partial (incremental did less than a full run) is benign, not a failure; only status=failed is a real error (CONVENTIONS.md).
panels.title: Ingest job rate by status

panels.description: Per-item ingest outcome rate, per selected memory stack. result=error|timeout means items are being dropped; backs the 'ingest item error rate elevated' alert.
panels.title: Ingest item rate by result

panels.description: Items currently being processed by the ingest workers, per selected memory stack. A rising, non-draining value indicates a stuck backlog.
panels.title: Ingest items in-flight

panels.description: Per-item ingest processing latency quantiles over 5m across the selected memory stack(s). This histogram carries no per-op label.
panels.title: Ingest item latency (p95/p99)

panels.description: Non-fatal loss counters: store-op failures (progress/finalize JobStore writes), source-index (SourceSink.Add) failures after a successful CreateMemory, and notify drops (job IDs dropped because the notify channel was full). All represent observable silent loss. These counters carry no service label in the source (internal/ingest/metrics.go), so they are process-wide, not split per memory stack.
panels.title: Ingest silent-loss errors

panels.description: Per-operation code-graph query rate (search/neighbors/shortest_path/communities/etc), per selected memory stack. This is how agents traverse the memory graph via the CLI MCP tools.
panels.title: Code-graph query rate by op

panels.description: Rate of code-graph queries returning result=error, per op, per selected memory stack. Agent graph traversals failing. Mirrors the 'code-graph query errors' alert (fires on any sustained value for 15m).
panels.title: Code-graph query errors by op

panels.description: Code-graph query latency quantiles over 5m, per selected memory stack.
panels.title: Code-graph query latency (p95/p99)

panels.description: Rate of graph entities and edges written per source repo during ingest, across the selected memory stack(s). Zero across all repos while ingest jobs run indicates the graph writer is stalled.
panels.title: Code-graph upsert throughput by repo

panels.description: Dirty-repo count (repos with graph changes awaiting centrality/community recompute) against the analytics run rate, per selected memory stack. Dirty repos > 0 with a flat-zero run rate is the exact 'analytics stalled with dirty repos' alert condition (fires after 1h).
panels.title: Analytics backlog: dirty repos vs recompute

panels.description: Centrality/community recompute duration quantiles over 30m, across the selected memory stack(s). This histogram carries no per-op or per-repo label. Long compute times explain a growing dirty-repo backlog.
panels.title: Analytics compute latency (p95/p99)

panels.description: Betweenness-centrality computations skipped (graph too large / budget exceeded) per 30m, alongside in-flight analytics runs, across the selected memory stack(s). Sustained skips mean centrality data is degrading.
panels.title: Betweenness skipped & analytics in-flight

panels.description: Rate of memory-service operations (create/query/delete/patch/edge ops) served to agents, split by op, per selected memory stack.
panels.title: Memory op rate by op

panels.description: Error ratio of memory ops over 5m, excluding get/get_entity (their not-found is a benign lookup miss per CONVENTIONS.md), per selected memory stack. Backs the 'service operation error ratio high' alert (fires >10% for 15m).
panels.title: Memory op error ratio (writes + non-lookup reads)

panels.description: Deletion-tombstone activity by op (created/forced/reaped/check_error/force_skipped_still_present), per selected memory stack. check_error or a spike in forced/skipped signals delete-consistency trouble between the store and LightRAG.
panels.title: Tombstone rate by op

panels.description: Server request rate by route, probes excluded, per selected memory stack. Filtered job=tatara-memory to avoid the name collision with tatara-chat's identically-named http_requests_total.
panels.title: HTTP request rate by route

panels.description: Share of non-probe requests returning a 5xx status text over 5m, per selected memory stack. Probes (/readyz,/healthz,/metrics) excluded consumer-side (CONVENTIONS.md pattern 2). Backs the 'HTTP 5xx error ratio high' alert (fires >5% for 10m).

targets.expr: sum(rate(http_requests_total{job="tatara-memory",service=~"$service",route!~"/readyz|/healthz|/metrics",status=~"Internal Server Error|Bad Gateway|Service Unavailable|Gateway Timeout|Not Implemented|HTTP Version Not Supported"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(http_requests_total{job="tatara-memory",service=~"$service",route!~"/readyz|/healthz|/metrics"}[5m])), 0.001)

panels.title: HTTP 5xx error ratio

panels.description: Server request latency quantiles over 5m, job=tatara-memory, per selected memory stack.
panels.title: HTTP latency (p95/p99)
Operator vantage (operator-global probes - no service filter)

panels.description: p95 of operator_memory_provision_duration_seconds over 5m: wall-clock for a per-project memory stack to reach Ready, measured from the operator (job=tatara-operator). This metric carries no per-project service label, so it cannot be filtered by $service.
panels.title: Memory provision p95

panels.description: Rate of operator_lightrag_query_errors_total: failed attempts by the operator to read document counts from a project's lightrag corpus.
panels.title: LightRAG document-count read errors

panels.description: Rate of operator_memory_retrieval_probe_total{result="absent"} by route (/queries, /code-graph/stats): the operator's authenticated functional probe hit a 404, i.e. a drifted/stale memory binary missing a contract route.
panels.title: Memory retrieval probe: absent by route

panels.description: Rate of operator_tool_surface_probe_total by backend (operator/chat), vantage (in-cluster), and result (ok/present/absent/error/unreachable). absent=route drift, error=handler broken, unreachable=process down.
panels.title: Tool-surface probe by backend/vantage/result
